contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/object_class.md
contract.description: Returns aggregated spending by major object class for a specified agency and fiscal year with optional substring filtering, sorting, and pagination.

toptier_code.description: Identifier for the agency whose object class data to return.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; must be a three- or four-digit CGAC/FREC code string with leading zeros preserved. Codes that fail this numeric pattern return an HTML 404, while well-formed but unknown codes return a JSON 404 detail message.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; accepts integers from 2008 through 2026 inclusive. Defaults to the current fiscal year (2026). Values before 2017 return empty results with a DATA Act coverage warning in 'messages'. Out-of-range values yield 422 errors and non-integer inputs return 400.

filter.description: Case-insensitive substring filter applied to the object class name.
filter.constraints: Optional; empty strings behave the same as omitting the parameter. Unmatched filters return 200 with empty results.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected sort field.
order.constraints: Optional; accepts only 'asc' or 'desc' (lowercase). Defaults to 'desc'. Other values produce 400 errors.

sort.constraints: Optional; accepts 'obligated_amount', 'gross_outlay_amount', or 'name'. Defaults to 'obligated_amount'. Values outside this set produce 400 errors.

page.constraints: Optional; integer values must be ≥ 1. Defaults to 1. Pages beyond the available range return 200 with empty results and hasNext=false. Non-integer or <1 values produce 400/422 errors.

limit.description: Maximum number of records per page.
limit.constraints: Optional; accepts integers from 1 to 100 inclusive. Defaults to 10. Values outside this range return 422 errors. Non-integer inputs return 400.

toptier_code.description: Echo of the requested toptier agency code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year associated with the response payload.

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the current slice of results.

total.description: Total number of records matching the request filters.

limit.description: Maximum records per page used for this response.

next.description: Next page number when additional pages exist; otherwise null.

previous.description: Previous page number when available; otherwise null.

hasPrevious.description: True when a prior page exists.

obligated_amount.description: Total obligated amount for the object class.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Total gross outlay amount for the object class.

messages.description: Array of warning or informational strings. Empty when data is available; pre-FY2017 requests return a fixed DATA Act coverage warning.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Successful responses omit the documented 'totals' object and never include nested 'children'; results are flat aggregates.
Pagination metadata uses a 'total' field in place of the documented 'count'.
Requests for fiscal years before 2017 return 200 with empty results and a fixed DATA Act coverage warning in 'messages'.
Path segments that are not zero-padded numeric CGAC/FREC codes (for example, '86' or alphabetic values) return HTML 404 pages instead of JSON.
When fiscal_year is omitted in February 2026 captures, the API defaults to FY2026.
risks: Clients must handle both JSON and HTML 404 responses depending on whether the toptier_code matches the expected numeric pattern.
Consumers should inspect the 'messages' array to detect empty datasets (for pre-2017 fiscal years) because HTTP status remains 200.
Large object class lists can require pagination; the service caps 'limit' at 100 records per page.
gaps: Valid CGAC/FREC codes beyond the sampled set remain undocumented; availability for each code must be confirmed empirically.
Public documentation still omits the FY2017 data availability cutoff communicated via the warning message.

probes.notes: Baseline response confirms flat results without totals/children and default FY2026.
Last page shows next=null and hasNext=false while retaining results.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"fiscal_year":2015,"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act;..."]}

probes.notes: Pre-FY2017 request returns empty results with the DATA Act warning.
Limit of 100 is accepted and returns the full list.
Validation error reveals the enforced limit ceiling.
Order parameter enforces lowercase enum values.
Two-digit toptier code lacking leading zero returns an HTML 404 page.

mismatches: Docs require a 'totals' object in the response, but live responses never include it.
Docs describe 'results' items with nested 'children', while live responses only expose name, obligated_amount, and gross_outlay_amount.
Docs reference 'page_metadata.count', but the service returns 'page_metadata.total' and omits 'count'.
gaps: Valid CGAC/FREC codes beyond the sampled set remain undocumented; availability for each code must be confirmed empirically.
Public documentation still omits the FY2017 data availability cutoff communicated via the warning message.
risks: Clients must handle both JSON and HTML 404 responses depending on whether the toptier_code matches the expected numeric pattern.
Consumers should inspect the 'messages' array to detect empty datasets (for pre-2017 fiscal years) because HTTP status remains 200.
Large object class lists can require pagination; the service caps 'limit' at 100 records per page.
